title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 16–18, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the heck is that guy?!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: HE TOOK A DIRECT HIIT FROM A BUGGY BALL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You could have at least told us what you were planning...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THAT EVENS THE ODDS A LITTLE!

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
